hero.subtitle: Data & AI Consultancy
hero.description: I partner with industry leaders to design scalable Data Mesh architectures and deploy transformative AI solutions. Delivering million-franc exactitude for the world's most demanding brands.

about.subtitle: My Philosophy
about.p1: Throughout my career, I have partnered with executive teams at global powerhouses, including BMW, Mercedes, Volkswagen, LIDL, and REWE, to untangle complex data landscapes and build scalable, intelligent architectures.
about.p2: My approach is rooted in practicality and vision. Whether implementing a decentralized Data Mesh or deploying transformative AI solutions, I bridge the gap between deep technical execution and high-level business strategy.
about.p3: Currently, I am driving digital transformation initiatives at PostFinance, shaping the future of financial data architecture in Switzerland.

services.subtitle: Core Competencies
services.description: I do not offer cookie-cutter solutions. I deliver bespoke architectural strategies and technical implementation tailored to the unique scale of your enterprise.

items.title: Data Mesh Architecture
items.desc: Designing decentralized, scalable data ecosystems. I empower your domains to take ownership of their data products, accelerating enterprise agility without centralized bottlenecks.

items.title: Artificial Intelligence
items.desc: Deploying generative AI and machine learning solutions that drive real business value. From automating complex workflows to building smart, predictive applications.

items.title: Data & Analytics Strategy
items.desc: Transforming raw data into strategic assets. I evaluate your data maturity and architect advanced analytics pipelines that meet industry-leading standards.
Driving digital transformation and architecting modern financial data platforms in Switzerland.
Advised major retail and CPG clients including LIDL and REWE on data strategy, governance, and advanced analytics implementations.
Architected intelligent data solutions and deployed machine learning models for automotive giants like BMW, Mercedes, and Volkswagen.

cta.subtitle: Initiate Contact
cta.description: Whether you need to untangle a complex data landscape or architect a generative AI solution, let's discuss how we can drive measurable impact for your enterprise.

contactPage.title: Initiate Contact
contactPage.description: Leave your details below and I will get back to you as soon as possible.
